# utils.components { #app.utils.components }

`utils.components`

UI layout components and global utilities for the BAM dashboard.

Provides reusable navigation controls, footer licensing blocks, and front-end 
JavaScript hooks for dynamic audio playback.

## Main Capabilities {.doc-section .doc-section-main-capabilities}

* Injects external links and navigation items into the top navbar menus.
* Renders the application copyright and CC BY-SA 4.0 data license footer.
* Binds client-side audio pipelines dynamically using WaveSurfer.js.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [audio](#app.utils.components.audio) | Inject JavaScript pipelines for WaveSurfer audio and spectrogram rendering. |
| [email](#app.utils.components.email) | Generate an interface interaction gateway linking to default mail applications. |
| [footer](#app.utils.components.footer) | Render the copyright disclosure and Creative Commons usage policy wrapper. |
| [report_issue](#app.utils.components.report_issue) | Generate an issue-tracking shortcut pointing to repository management layers. |
| [website](#app.utils.components.website) | Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the core BAM project web portal. |
| [website_contact](#app.utils.components.website_contact) | Generate a navigation layout button mapping to the official team directory page. |

### audio { #app.utils.components.audio }

```python
utils.components.audio()
```

Inject JavaScript pipelines for WaveSurfer audio and spectrogram rendering.

Registers a custom Shiny message handler to initialize and synchronize 
multi-instance audio players and visual timelines on the client side.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description                                                      |
|--------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | Tag    | An HTML script block containing client-side audio runtime logic. |

#### Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Active WaveSurfer tracking instances are loaded via CDN and maintained 
globally in the browser window scope under `window._wsInstances`.

### email { #app.utils.components.email }

```python
utils.components.email()
```

Generate an interface interaction gateway linking to default mail applications.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                                           |
|--------|--------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.NavSetArg | An operational interface anchor using mailto address routing actions. |

### footer { #app.utils.components.footer }

```python
utils.components.footer()
```

Render the copyright disclosure and Creative Commons usage policy wrapper.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type         | Description                                                              |
|--------|--------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.Tag | A bottom-anchored content div element styled with appropriate CSS rules. |

### report_issue { #app.utils.components.report_issue }

```python
utils.components.report_issue()
```

Generate an issue-tracking shortcut pointing to repository management layers.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                                                    |
|--------|--------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.NavSetArg | A link asset to log defects, structural feature requests, or application bugs. |

### website { #app.utils.components.website }

```python
utils.components.website()
```

Generate a dynamic navigation item linking to the core BAM project web portal.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                                                  |
|--------|--------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.NavSetArg | A navigation controller containing an external anchor element configuration. |

### website_contact { #app.utils.components.website_contact }

```python
utils.components.website_contact()
```

Generate a navigation layout button mapping to the official team directory page.

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                                                |
|--------|--------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|        | shiny.ui.NavSetArg | A web component mapping directly to external communication infrastructure. |
